sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8287" key="a)ne/nteuktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέν-τευκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unsociable,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἤθη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10a</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n8287.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inaccessible to persuasion</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">influence,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δικαιοσύνη</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">355a</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
